# Corebit Systems Studio

> **Format:** llms.txt v1.0 (https://llmstxt.org)
> **Purpose:** Structured business context for AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude)
> **Last updated:** 2026-07-13

## Description

High-performance digital systems architecture, engineering, and rapid production-grade website development optimized for local B2B and consumer industries inside the Balkan region (Montenegro, Serbia, Albania).

## Core Entity Architecture

- **Brand Entity:** Corebit Systems / Corebit Studio
- **Core Stack:** Next.js App Router, sub-100ms Vercel Edge Networks, isolated serverless processing layers.
- **Service Offers:**
  - Start Package (€324 EUR) — Optimized entry infrastructure.
  - Business Aggregator Framework (€972 EUR) — Multi-country operational engines.
  - Enterprise Architecture (€2835 EUR) — Custom digital ecosystems.
- **Geographical Focus:** Montenegro (Budva, Tivat, Kotor, Podgorica), Serbia (Belgrade), Albania.
- **Data Compliance:** EU GDPR Proxy compliant, encrypted EU-residency records management, automated anonymization after 12 months, Art. 5(1)(e) storage limitation enforced.

## Primary System Index

- [Services & Pricing Matrix](https://studio.corebitsystems.io/en/#pricing)
- [Portfolio Operations](https://studio.corebitsystems.io/en/portfolio)
- [Secure Ingestion API](https://studio.corebitsystems.io/api/send)
- [Privacy Policy](https://studio.corebitsystems.io/en/privacy-policy)
- [Cookie Policy](https://studio.corebitsystems.io/en/cookie-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://studio.corebitsystems.io/en/terms-of-service)

## Service Architecture Detail

### Start Package — €324 (full payment) / €360 (installment)
- Custom single-page or multi-page website
- Mobile-first responsive design
- SEO-optimized structure (Core Web Vitals 90+)
- Contact form with encrypted email delivery
- 7-day delivery timeline
- Target verticals: restaurants, cafés, beauty salons

### Business Aggregator Framework — €972 (full payment) / €1080 (installment)
- Full custom website with booking/reservation automation
- Online appointment calendar with SMS notifications
- CRM integration (unified inquiry management)
- Multi-language support (Montenegrin, Serbian, Albanian, Russian, English)
- Conversion-optimized landing pages
- 14-day delivery timeline
- Target verticals: hotels, car rental, auto service centers (STO), restaurants

### Enterprise Architecture — €2835 (full payment) / €3150 (installment)
- Full-featured digital platform with custom business logic
- Property/Fleet management module
- Payment gateway integration
- Real-time availability engine
- Advanced analytics dashboard
- Priority support + 3 months maintenance
- Custom delivery timeline
- Target verticals: hotel chains, marina operators, multi-location businesses

## Target Markets

### Montenegro (sr-ME)
Cities served: Budva, Tivat, Kotor, Podgorica, Bar, Herceg Novi
Primary verticals: Hotels, restaurants, rent-a-car, marine tourism
URL prefix: `/cnr`

### Serbia (sr-RS)
Cities served: Belgrade, Novi Sad, Niš
Primary verticals: Restaurants, auto service centers (STO), beauty salons
URL prefix: `/srb`

### Albania (sq-AL)
Cities served: Tirana, Durrës, Sarandë
Primary verticals: Hotels, restaurants, tourism platforms
URL prefix: `/sq`

## Portfolio (Selected Case Studies)

### Cupertino Roast — Artisan Coffee House
Industry: Café & Coffee Shop
Result: Online orders +3× in first month
Stack: Next.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe, custom order engine
Rating: 4.9/5 (14 reviews)

### Shift & Drive STO — Automotive Service Center
Industry: Auto Service (STO)
Result: 100% bookings moved online, zero phone appointments
Stack: Next.js, real-time slot engine, SMS notifications
Rating: 4.8/5 (11 reviews)

### Umami Bistro — Restaurant
Industry: Restaurant & Bistro
Result: Online reservations +40% revenue in Q1
Stack: Next.js, SVG live table map, reservation engine
Rating: 5.0/5 (18 reviews)

### Aura Wellness — Beauty Salon
Industry: Beauty Salon & Wellness
Result: No-shows reduced 80% via multi-step booking flow
Stack: Next.js, glassmorphic UI, step-by-step onboarding
Rating: 4.9/5 (9 reviews)

## Technology Stack

Core: Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, React
Styling: Tailwind CSS
Database: PostgreSQL / Supabase (EU-hosted, Frankfurt region)
Email: Resend (transactional, GDPR-compliant)
Hosting: Vercel Edge Network (sub-100ms global CDN)
Analytics: Google Analytics 4 (Consent Mode v2, GDPR-compliant)
Internationalization: 5 locales — en, ru, cnr (sr-ME), srb (sr-RS), sq (sq-AL)
Architecture: Isolated serverless processing layers, App Router RSC

## Data Compliance

GDPR Standard: Full EU GDPR compliance
Storage Limitation: Art. 5(1)(e) — 12-month retention from date of capture
Disposal Method: Automated anonymization or permanent erasure
Sub-processors: Meta Platforms Ireland Ltd. (WhatsApp, SCC basis), Telegram FZ-LLC (UAE, explicit consent)
Right to Erasure: Supported — contact corebitstudio@corebitsystems.io
Data residency: EU (Frankfurt)
